title: The Overflow and Circulation Activation
subtitle: A weekly ritual for deepening the relationship between giving, receiving, and continuous flow
excerpt: A weekly ritual ceremony from Week 9 of the Money Journal program. Works through the five-part ceremony shape with the specific intention of releasing fear of running out and allowing effortless circulation of money and opportunity.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Week 9 Ritual in MONEY Journal (Rebecca Page, 2025). Used with permission as part of the homemade.education Mindset library.

practice.whenToUse: Use once at the start of a week when fear of running out or guilt about having more than others is present, or when generosity feels risky.

content.text: A weekly ritual for the fear that giving freely means less arriving, and for the guilt that comes with having more than the people around you. Works through the ceremony shape: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor.
Light a candle or hold something meaningful. Picture yourself at the centre of a current that moves both toward and away from you — money, opportunity, support, generosity, all in motion.
I am ready to release all fear of running out, all guilt about having more, and all hesitation around giving freely. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align to and allow effortless circulation of money, love, and opportunity. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Take a slow breath in and all the way out. Imagine the current continuing to flow — money arriving and leaving without panic in either direction, each wave steady.
Write this anchor statement in your own handwriting. Say it aloud:
This week, overflow and generosity move together in every area of my life.
Adapted from the Week 9 Ritual in MONEY Journal (Rebecca Page, 2025). Part of the 12-week Money Journal ceremony series.
